recent_commits.summary: This code adds a new API route that handles the generation of B2B leads based on user input or uploaded CSV files. It includes form validation to ensure proper data entry before processing.

recent_commits.message: feat: implement client onboarding flow, AI performance dashboard, and global portal header
recent_commits.summary: The code adds new AI activity components for email, company research, reply analysis, proposal generation, and call script creation. It also introduces a new section on routing steps with profiles like Dominant, Influential, and Steady, each with their own conditions, models, tasks, costs, and badges.

recent_commits.message:
Initialize README with project overview and setup

Added detailed project description, features, and setup instructions.
recent_commits.summary: This is a new file that provides an introduction to the Empathy Engine project. It outlines what the platform does, its key features, and how to set it up locally.
The commit contains only the removal of a README file.

The code adds a new API route in the src/components/leads directory to handle lead details. It includes functions to calculate the lead score and render various components like ScoreDisplay, DiscBadge, and ScoreBar.

final_review: Freshers' team built an AI-driven Empathy Engine platform with React, Next.js for front-end development, MongoDB for database management, and Express for backend services. They started by setting up the project structure and API routes, before adding detailed features like lead scoring, AI-generated components, and B2B lead generation. The code quality varied; some commits were well-structured and focused on specific tasks, while others lacked clarity or functionality. The team's AI-generated code was identified in multiple commits, suggesting that some parts of the project might have been generated using AI tools. Overall, their output demonstrates a mix of basic setup and working features, with room for improvement in terms of both technical depth and code quality.
